productDisplayName: Puma Men Street Step Mid Black Shoes
description: puma has its roots in Germany, and the brand is known for its minimalist design in high-end athletic footwear. Crafted in the brand's signature style, these puma Street Step Mid shoes are the right solution for brand conscious comfort junkies. These sandals are great for regular wear as they ensure superior traction and protection to the feet, without compromising on comfort and style.UpperLeather upper with high top stylingSynthetic twill tape lacesComfort insole with padded tongue to ensure a snug, comfortable FitCanvas lining for added comfortLeather mud guard and a heel bumperElasticated insert above the heel collarMidsolePU midsole with double foxingOutsoleRubber outsole with terraced lugs and brandingshoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
